officialIntent.fallbackPath: Gaming Hub home -> More -> Game Booster settings -> Pause USB PD charging when gaming

guidanceSteps: Primary app-control path: install/open Shizuku, start it with Wireless debugging, grant Charge Pilot once, then tap Turn on bypass charging in Charge Pilot.
Normal Android Modify system settings access was tested on S24 Ultra and did not write the Samsung pass_through key.

For a normal app, do not only add a Gaming Hub shortcut. Install Samsung Game Plugins plus the Game Booster+ module, then use Game Booster+ -> Game category settings to classify the target app as Game.
Verified caveat: the tested SM-S9280 Taiwan One UI 8 build opens Game Booster+ but returns 'Unable to run: GOS Lite', so normal-app classification is blocked on that firmware.
Manual fallback: open Gaming Hub -> More -> Game Booster settings -> Pause USB PD charging when gaming.

officialIntent.fallbackPath: Gaming Hub home -> More -> Game Booster settings -> Pause USB PD charging when gaming

guidanceSteps: Samsung blocks direct third-party launch of the hidden Game Booster settings activity on this S24 Ultra.
Tap Open official path to open Gaming Hub, then open More and Game Booster settings.
For a normal app, install Samsung Game Plugins plus the Game Booster+ module, then use Game Booster+ -> Game category settings to classify the target app as Game before launching it.

If Game Plugins or Game Booster+ shows 'Unable to run: GOS Lite', this firmware cannot use Game Booster+ classification; use a real game session or the Shizuku pass_through control path where available.
Enable Pause USB PD charging when gaming, connect a USB PD/PPS charger, keep battery above 20%, and launch a game.

officialIntent.fallbackPath: Settings -> Battery -> Battery health -> Charging optimization -> Limit to 80%

guidanceSteps: Tap Open official path to open Android Battery settings.
Open Battery health / Charging optimization and choose Limit to 80%.

officialIntent.fallbackPath: Settings -> Battery -> Battery health -> Charging optimization -> Adaptive Charging

guidanceSteps: Tap Open official path to open Android Battery settings.
Open Battery health / Charging optimization and enable Adaptive Charging.

officialIntent.fallbackPath: Settings -> Battery / high-load use -> Bypass charging (OxygenOS 16 supported models)

guidanceSteps: Tap Open official path to open Settings.
Search Battery or high-load use settings for Bypass charging on supported OxygenOS 16 models.

officialIntent.fallbackPath: Settings -> Battery -> More battery settings -> Smart Charge / Smart Battery Capacity

guidanceSteps: Tap Open official path to open Settings.
Open Battery, then More battery settings, and enable Smart Charge or Smart Battery Capacity.

officialIntent.fallbackPath: Settings -> Battery -> More battery settings -> Smart Charge

guidanceSteps: Tap Open official path to open Settings.
Open Battery, then More battery settings, and enable Smart Charge.

officialIntent.fallbackPath: Settings -> Battery -> More battery settings -> Custom limit

guidanceSteps: Tap Open official path to open Settings.
Open Battery, then More battery settings, and configure Custom limit.

officialIntent.fallbackPath: Settings -> Battery -> Battery protection / Charging modes -> 80% limit (supported models)

guidanceSteps: Tap Open official path to open Settings.
Open Battery protection or Charging modes and choose the 80% limit when the model supports it.

officialIntent.fallbackPath: Settings -> Battery -> Battery protection / Optimized charging / Nighttime charging protection

guidanceSteps: Tap Open official path to open Settings.
Open Battery protection and enable Optimized charging or Nighttime charging protection.
This model is recorded as unsupported for bypass charging in the bundled registry.
